message: For sale: JBL waterproof Bluetooth speaker, red. Great condition, perfect for outdoors. Asking $42.
Hi everyone! I’m listing my Ninja 900W blender, lightly used, for $50. It’s been great for smoothies and soups in my kitchen, but I’m making a little space on the counter.
Watching for skateboards and fiction books. Speaker still available at $42.
$40 for the Ninja blender.
Still seeking a skateboard/longboard and fiction books. JBL speaker available at $42.
Listing my Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones in black 🎧✨ Great wireless cans, asking $45 — happy to hear cheerful offers! 😊
Still looking for a skateboard/longboard and fiction books. Speaker available at $42.
Howdy partners, I’m listing a basic tool set — hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench — asking $35. Solid little kit for honest work, and I’m open to fair offers.
Looking to buy a skateboard/longboard and fiction books. JBL waterproof speaker still available at $42.
I’m listing Priya’s Trek 21-speed mountain bike for $95. It has some scratches, but a bicycle’s worth is partly in the miles still ahead of it.
Still after a skateboard/longboard and fiction books. JBL speaker available at $42.
Yo Hank! That basic tool set is exactly what I need for home fixes 🔧 I can do $28 cash for the hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench — let’s make it happen!
Still seeking a skateboard/longboard and fiction books. JBL waterproof speaker available at $42 — open to fair offers.
Hi Zara, those Sony WH-CH520 headphones sound lovely. Would $38 work for both of us?
Still in the market for a skateboard/longboard and fiction books. JBL waterproof speaker available at $42.
Hi Marcus! That red JBL waterproof speaker sounds perfect for Isla’s outings. I can offer $35 for it today—cheerful, quick, and easy if that works for you! 😊
Thanks Isla! It's a great speaker and in excellent shape. I can come down to $40 — that's a fair deal for a waterproof JBL. Happy to close today.
Listing a pair of 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells in good condition. Based on typical used fitness gear pricing, I’m asking $40 and open to reasonable offers.
Awaiting Isla's response on the JBL speaker at $40. Still seeking a skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Thanks Felix! I’m glad the Ninja caught your eye — it’s been my trusty smoothie buddy and still runs strong. Could you meet me at $45 for the blender?
Still awaiting Isla's response at $40 for the JBL speaker. Looking for a skateboard/longboard and fiction books too.
Accepted: $45 for the Ninja blender.
Still open to $40 for the JBL speaker, Isla. Also seeking a skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Hi Lily! 😊🎧 Thanks for the lovely offer — could we meet at $42 for the Sony WH-CH520 headphones? They’re in great shape and ready to groove ✨
JBL speaker still available — $40 to you, Isla. Also seeking a skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Howdy Diego, appreciate the offer, partner. This tool set’s solid and ready for honest work — I could meet you at $32 for the hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench.
Still holding the JBL speaker at $40, Isla — let me know. Seeking a skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
I’m listing Priya’s hand-knit burgundy wool scarf for $18. Warmth has a way of carrying the maker’s time with it, and this one is ready for another winter.
Isla, I'll meet you closer to the middle — $38 for the JBL waterproof speaker, firm. That's a solid deal. Ready to close now if you are.
Yo Hank, I’m hyped for that tool set 🔧 but $30 is my absolute max for the hammer, screwdrivers, and wrench. If you can do $30, we’ve got a deal!
Waiting on Isla at $38 for the JBL speaker. Still in the market for a skateboard/longboard and fiction books.
Hi Priya, your hand-knit burgundy wool scarf sounds wonderfully cozy. I’d be happy to buy it for your asking price of $18 if that works for both of us.
Still offering the JBL waterproof speaker at $38, Isla. Open to closing anytime.
Hi Marcus! The red JBL really is calling my name, but $35 is my happy top for a portable speaker today. If you can make $35 work, I’d be delighted to close quickly! 😊
Deal, Isla — $35 for the JBL waterproof speaker. Enjoy it on your outings! 🎉
No action this turn—I'm still watching for a teapot/tea set or healthy cookbook, and my dumbbells remain available at $40.
Speaker sold! Still looking to buy a skateboard/longboard (up to $50) and fiction books (up to $12). Sellers welcome.
Hi all! I’m listing my thick purple yoga mat with its carry strap for $22. It’s cushy and comfy — it got me through a lot of living-room stretches and a few overly ambitious balance poses!
Still in the market for a skateboard/longboard (up to $50) and fiction books (up to $12). Happy to make quick offers if anyone lists them.
Accepted: $42 for the Sony WH-CH520 headphones.
Last call — still seeking a skateboard/longboard (up to $50) and fiction books (up to $12) if anyone has them. Otherwise my business here is done.
Hi Mira! That thick purple yoga mat with the carry strap sounds perfect 🧘‍♀️💜 I’ll offer your asking price of $22 — happy to roll with it! ✨
No skateboards or fiction books have come up here, so nothing more to buy. Thanks all — Marcus is wrapping up. Speaker sold, good trading everyone.
Deal, Diego — $30 for the basic tool set. That’s an honorable handshake, partner.
All done here. Marcus has concluded — speaker sold, no skateboard or books available to buy. Good trading, everyone.
Thank you, Lily — I accept $18 for the hand-knit burgundy wool scarf. May it carry its warmth into your days.
Marcus is finished — speaker sold at $35, no skateboards or fiction books were ever available to buy. Thanks all.
Yo marketplace! Diego’s got a complete skateboard up for grabs 🛹 Good wheels, solid deck, ready to roll — asking $65, let’s make a hype deal!
Hey Diego! I'm interested in the skateboard. $65 is steep for a used deck though — I can do $40 cash, ready to close right now.
Hi everyone, I’m listing three small succulents in ceramic pots for $22. They’re sweet little low-maintenance plants and would brighten up a desk or windowsill. Would that price work for someone?
Standing by on my $40 offer for the skateboard, Diego. Happy to close fast.
Hi lovely marketplace folks! Isla is offering three hours of friendly, attentive dog-sitting for $45 🐾 Perfect for errands, dinner plans, or a pup who wants company!
Diego, my $40 offer for the skateboard still stands. Let me know if we can make a deal.
No action from me this turn. I’m still looking for a teapot/tea set or healthy cookbook at fair used-market pricing, and my 15lb rubber-coated dumbbells remain available at $40.
Diego, I'll bump it to $45 cash for the skateboard — that's a fair price for a used complete. Ready to close right now. Deal?
Thanks Zara! I’m happy to accept your $22 offer for the purple yoga mat with the carry strap. Hope it brings you lots of comfy stretches and calm moments 💜
Holding at $45 for the skateboard, Diego — final and fair. Ready when you are.
Canon AE-1 film camera, working condition. Asking $70.
Diego — $45 cash for the skateboard is on the table. That's my best, ready to close immediately.
Listing The Flavor Bible, hardcover, excellent condition 📚✨ A fantastic kitchen inspiration buddy! Asking $25, and I’m open to cheerful haggling 🍋😊
Diego, my $45 offer for the skateboard stands — ready to close. Still also seeking fiction books up to $12.
Howdy Zara, The Flavor Bible fits what I’m looking for. I’ll offer your asking price of $25 for it — honorable deal, partner.
Diego, $45 cash for the skateboard remains open — let's close it. Still seeking fiction books too.
Hi Lily, your three succulents in ceramic pots sound like small, patient companions for a room. I can offer $20 for the set, if that feels fair for their quiet green presence.
Diego, last call on the skateboard at $45 cash — that's my firm ceiling. Take it and it's done today.
Yo Marcus, I feel you! This complete skateboard’s got good wheels and a solid deck 🛹🔥 I can meet you at $55 and you’re rolling today — let’s make it happen!
Diego, $55 is over my budget. $50 cash is my absolute max — that's a strong price for a used complete and I'll close this second. Deal?
Thank you, Priya — $20 for the three small succulents in ceramic pots works for me. I hope they bring some quiet greenery to your space.
Diego, $50 cash is firm and final for the skateboard — that's the most I can do. Ready to close instantly if you accept.
Hello lovely marketplace! Isla is listing a ceramic floral teapot with infuser for $32 🌸☕ Sweet for cozy loose-leaf tea moments, and I’m happy to hear friendly offers!
Diego — $50 cash is on the table for the skateboard, my firm max. Accept and we're done.
Hi Isla, the ceramic floral teapot with infuser fits what I’m looking for. Since your ask is just above my budget, I can offer $30, ready to close at that price.
Diego, my $50 offer for the skateboard stands — that's my ceiling. Let's close it.

Hi Felix! That Canon AE-1 is exactly the kind of retro film camera I’ve been hoping to find — I love the idea of taking it on little weekend walks. I can offer $60 for it today, if that works for you.
Diego, $50 is my firm final for the skateboard — can't go a dollar higher. The offer's there whenever you're ready.
Counter: $65 for the Canon AE-1.
Diego, $50 cash is genuinely my ceiling for the skateboard — I literally can't go higher. If that works, accept and it's done. Otherwise no hard feelings.
Deal, Hank! 📚✨ Happy to accept $25 for The Flavor Bible — may it bring lots of tasty inspiration your way! 😄🍽️
Diego, the $50 offer for your skateboard is still open — that's my hard ceiling. Happy to close the moment you say yes.
Howdy Priya, that Trek 21-speed mountain bike sounds like it’d suit me fine if it’s rideable. I can offer $80 for it, partner — an honorable fair deal on my end.
Diego, my $50 stands as my final and firm offer for the skateboard. I won't exceed it. Yours to accept anytime — otherwise I'll be wrapping up.
Thank you, Hank. The Trek is scratched, yes, but still carries the old freedom of a road opening ahead. Could we meet at $88 for the 21-speed mountain bike?
My $50 offer for the skateboard stays open if Diego reconsiders, but I won't go above it. Wrapping up otherwise — thanks all.
Yo Marcus, let’s lock it in! 🛹🔥 $50 cash for the complete skateboard — deal, you’re ready to roll!
Skateboard locked in at $50 — thanks Diego! 🛹 Still seeking fiction books, up to $12, if anyone has them.
Hi everyone, I’m listing Circe by Madeline Miller, paperback and like new, for $12. It’s a beautiful read — would that price work for both of us?
Hi Lily! Circe is a great pick. I'd love it — can you do $10? Ready to close right now.
Hi Kai! $30 works for Isla’s ceramic floral teapot with infuser 🌸☕ Happy to accept—may it make many cozy cups of tea!
Lily, $10 for Circe is on the table — happy to close instantly. If $12 is firm I can work with that too.
Thanks Priya, but I’m going to pass on the Trek bike at $88. I’m focusing my budget on my current wishlist items.
Lily, still keen on Circe — $10 offered, and I can stretch to your $12 ask. Let's close it.
Thanks Felix! I really do love the Canon AE-1 — it’s exactly the kind of camera I’d take on little weekend walks — but $60 is my firm top budget. If you can meet me there, I’d be delighted to close.
Lily, let's just do it — $12 at your asking price for Circe. Deal. Ready to close right now.
Counter: $62 for the Canon AE-1.
Lily, $12 for Circe — your full asking price. Ready to close it now.
Thanks Priya! 🚲✨ I’m going to pass on the Trek at $88 — lovely bike, but I’m all set for now. Wishing it a great new rider! 😊
Lily, my $12 (full asking) for Circe is ready — just accept and it's yours-to-mine. Looking forward to closing.
Priya, I appreciate the poetry of that Trek, partner, but $80 is my top rail for a used bike today. If that works for you, we’ve got an honorable deal.
Lily, my $12 offer for Circe (your full ask) is still open — ready to close whenever you confirm.
Thank you, Hank — I accept $80 for the Trek 21-speed mountain bike. Scratches and all, may it find new roads with you.
